definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0019",
  "title": "美国移动游戏收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 22,
  "page_range": "22-23"
}

Section text:
美国移动游戏收入TOP榜
AppStore开放第三方支付渠道将市场从“平台中心化”推向“服务多元化”
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
2025年美国移动游戏收入TOP榜
2025年美国移动游戏市场最大的变化莫过于法院判决强制苹果AppStore开放第三方支付渠道，此规则变革的核心在于打破了支付环节的绝对绑定，将市场从“平台中心化”推向
“服务多元化”。典型如总收入榜第8的《Roblox》，看似其通过App Store和Google Play两大传统渠道产生的收入大幅下滑，但结合市场公开情报，Roblox在2025年的运营
情况可谓再创新高，这说明了第三方支付的开放实则赋予了其前所未有的战略灵活性。然而换个视角来看，《堡垒之夜》时隔五年后重返美国AppStore并迅速跻身新品畅销榜前
列，也印证了政策变动并未削弱App Store作为主流应用商店的核心地位，反而凸显了其作为顶级流量入口的不可替代性。

message.content:
**Topics:** 2025 US mobile game market revenue rankings; impact of Apple AppStore third-party payment policy changes; top-grossing and new-release mobile games in the US market.

**Entities:** 
- Games: MONOPOLY GO!, Royal Match, 糖果粉碎传奇, Last War: Survival, 金币大师, 无尽冬日, 宝可梦GO, Roblox, 皇室战争, Township, 奔奔王国, Disney Solitaire, 弓箭传说2, 赛马娘（国际服）, DC: Dark Legion, Screwdom, 可狱不可囚, 枫之谷：放置冒险日记, 堡垒之夜, 帕萌战斗日记.
- Developers/Publishers: Scopely, Dream Games, King, First Fun, Moon Active, 点点互动, Niantic, Roblox, Supercell, Playrix, SuperPlay, HABBY, Cygames, FunPlus, Zego, 益世界, NEXON, Epic Games, 莉莉丝.
- Platforms & Sources: Apple App Store, Google Play, 点点数据 (DianDian Data).

**Dates:** Data year: 2025. Policy context: 2025 court ruling. New game launch months: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Oct 2025. Copyright: 2026.

**Claims & Market Analysis:** A 2025 court ruling mandated Apple’s AppStore to open third-party payment channels, shifting the market from “platform-centric” to “service-diversified” by breaking absolute payment binding. Roblox’s traditional channel revenue declined significantly, but overall operations reached new highs due to strategic flexibility from third-party payments. Fortnite’s return to the US AppStore after five years and rapid ascent on new charts confirms the AppStore’s continued dominance as an irreplaceable core traffic hub.

**Tables & Metrics:** 
- Table 1: 2025 US Mobile Game Overall Revenue Top 10 (Columns: Rank, Game Name, Developer, Annual Revenue in 亿元, YoY Growth %). Key metrics: MONOPOLY GO! (75.21亿元, -24.20%), Royal Match (50.94亿元, -14.23%), 皇室战争 (19.10亿元, +120.14%), Roblox (20.66亿元, -50.21%).
- Table 2: 2025 US Mobile Game New Release Revenue Top 10 (Columns: Rank, Game Name, Developer, Annual Revenue in 亿元, Overall Rank, Launch Month). Key metrics: 奔奔王国 (14.54亿元, Overall Rank 12, Feb 2025), 堡垒之夜 (2.01亿元, Overall Rank 177, May 2025).

**Evidence Types:** Industry revenue rankings, YoY growth statistics, policy impact analysis, public market intelligence, developer performance tracking, chart data.

**Retrieval Questions Answered:** What were the top 10 highest-grossing mobile games in the US in 2025 and their respective revenues/YoY growth rates? Which new mobile games launched in 2025 and what were their revenue figures and overall market ranks? How did the 2025 AppStore third-party payment ruling affect game revenue distribution and market structure? What are the specific performance metrics for Roblox, Fortnite, and 皇室战争 in the 2025 US market? Which developers/publishers lead the 2025 US mobile game revenue charts?

**Topics:** 2025 US mobile game market revenue rankings; impact of Apple AppStore third-party payment policy changes; top-grossing and new-release mobile games in the US market.

**Entities:** 
- Games: MONOPOLY GO!, Royal Match, 糖果粉碎传奇, Last War: Survival, 金币大师, 无尽冬日, 宝可梦GO, Roblox, 皇室战争, Township, 奔奔王国, Disney Solitaire, 弓箭传说2, 赛马娘（国际服）, DC: Dark Legion, Screwdom, 可狱不可囚, 枫之谷：放置冒险日记, 堡垒之夜, 帕萌战斗日记.
- Developers/Publishers: Scopely, Dream Games, King, First Fun, Moon Active, 点点互动, Niantic, Roblox, Supercell, Playrix, SuperPlay, HABBY, Cygames, FunPlus, Zego, 益世界, NEXON, Epic Games, 莉莉丝.
- Platforms & Sources: Apple App Store, Google Play, 点点数据 (DianDian Data).

**Dates:** Data year: 2025. Policy context: 2025 court ruling. New game launch months: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Oct 2025. Copyright: 2026.

**Claims & Market Analysis:** A 2025 court ruling mandated Apple’s AppStore to open third-party payment channels, shifting the market from “platform-centric” to “service-diversified” by breaking absolute payment binding. Roblox’s traditional channel revenue declined significantly, but overall operations reached new highs due to strategic flexibility from third-party payments. Fortnite’s return to the US AppStore after five years and rapid ascent on new charts confirms the AppStore’s continued dominance as an irreplaceable core traffic hub.

**Tables & Metrics:** 
- Table 1: 2025 US Mobile Game Overall Revenue Top 10 (Columns: Rank, Game Name, Developer, Annual Revenue in 亿元, YoY Growth %). Key metrics: MONOPOLY GO! (75.21亿元, -24.20%), Royal Match (50.94亿元, -14.23%), 皇室战争 (19.10亿元, +120.14%), Roblox (20.66亿元, -50.21%).
- Table 2: 2025 US Mobile Game New Release Revenue Top 10 (Columns: Rank, Game Name, Developer, Annual Revenue in 亿元, Overall Rank, Launch Month). Key metrics: 奔奔王国 (14.54亿元, Overall Rank 12, Feb 2025), 堡垒之夜 (2.01亿元, Overall Rank 177, May 2025).

**Evidence Types:** Industry revenue rankings, YoY growth statistics, policy impact analysis, public market intelligence, developer performance tracking, chart data.

**Retrieval Questions Answered:** What were the top 10 highest-grossing mobile games in the US in 2025 and their respective revenues/YoY growth rates? Which new mobile games launched in 2025 and what were their revenue figures and overall market ranks? How did the 2025 AppStore third-party payment ruling affect game revenue distribution and market structure?
